modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Questions about logging into SharePoint using Google Chrome

full_description_text:  
El técnico de campo está intentando acceder a SharePoint a través de Google Chrome. Tiene preguntas generales sobre cómo usar la plataforma y específicamente sobre el proceso de inicio de sesión. A pesar de sus esfuerzos, no está seguro de los pasos necesarios para ingresar correctamente a SharePoint.
